creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rene
Date: Mon May  5 11:33:59 2014
New Revision: 352994
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/352994
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r352994/

Log:
  Fix quoting of environment variables.
  
  PR:		ports/187702
  Submitted by:	Dominic Fandrey <kamikaze@bsdforen.de>

Modified:
  head/www/chromium/Makefile

Modified: head/www/chromium/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/chromium/Makefile	Mon May  5 11:15:53 2014	(r352993)
+++ head/www/chromium/Makefile	Mon May  5 11:33:59 2014	(r352994)
@@ -138,12 +138,12 @@ BUILDTYPE=	Release
 GYP_DEFINES+=	buildtype=Official
 .endif
 
-CONFIGURE_ENV+=	CC=${CC} \
-		CXX=${CXX} \
+CONFIGURE_ENV+=	CC="${CC}" \
+		CXX="${CXX}" \
 		GYP_GENERATORS=ninja \
 		GYP_DEFINES="${GYP_DEFINES}"
 MAKE_ENV+=	BUILDTYPE=${BUILDTYPE} \
-		GPERF=${LOCALBASE}/bin/gperf
+		GPERF="${LOCALBASE}/bin/gperf"
 MAKE_ARGS+=	-C out/${BUILDTYPE}
 
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
